creator: pauamma@gundo.com
text:
The following URLs list the emulator/hercules port version as 3.07, when the port version is actually 3.08:

- https://www.freebsd.org/ports/emulators.html
- https://www.freebsd.org/ports/master-index.html
- https://www.freebsd.org/ports/emulators.html#hercules-3.07

In addition, https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/url.cgi?ports/emulators/hercules/pkg-descr has the wrong URL for the Hercules website. Correct URL is http://www.hercules-390.eu/, not http://www.hercules-390.org/.

Note: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/emulators/hercules/Makefile?revision=320958&view=markup has the correct version and http://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/emulators/hercules/pkg-descr?revision=320958&view=markup the correct URL, so I'm guessing some crontab entry for updating the website from the ports tree isn't running correctly.

How-To-Repeat: Visit the URLs listed above and note the discrepancies.
